name: Easy Herbed Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook your favorite pasta until al dente.
2. Melt cream cheese and milk over medium heat. Add parsley, green onion, garlic, salt, and pepper.
3. Stir in parmesan cheese, toss with cooked pasta, and serve.
Notes: Make sure the cheese sauce does not boil. If it is too thick, add extra milk one tablespoon at a time.
